name: Web Dottore
description: Dottore (also known as Il Dottore) is a member of the Fatui organization who holds the position of the second harbinger. (Fatui is an organization originating from Snezhnaya. It consists of 2 branches: diplomatic and military, run by Harbingers who report to the Tsaritsa. They are one of the main antagonistic factions). This character is a segment of the real Dottore. (The real Dottore created "segments of himself" – parts of himself based on different periods of his life in order to expand his knowledge and life span)
creator: xGalaxyStarx
